ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "address" TEXT /* MAC address of the sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., temperature, humidity, pressure, beacon) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the sensor is deployed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the sensor */,
  "last_seen" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the sensor was seen */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Battery level of the sensor (if applicable) */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was installed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES sensor_locations ("location_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor type */,
  "measurement_units" TEXT /* Default measurement units for the sensor type */,
  "data_fields" TEXT /* JSON object describing the data fields and their types for the sensor type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "floor" INTEGER /* Floor number of the location (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor configuration */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor */,
  "config_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was configured */,
  "config_data" TEXT /* Configuration data for the sensor */,
  "config_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who configured the sensor */,
  "config_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the configuration */,
  "config_version" TEXT /* Version number of the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_configurations_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was collected */,
  "data_value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the data point */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, API, manual input) */,
  "data_quality" INTEGER /* Quality score of the data (e.g., 0-100) */,
  "data_flags" TEXT /* Flags indicating any issues with the data (e.g., missing, corrupted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "beacon_data" (
  "beacon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each beacon data point */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was collected */,
  "major" INTEGER /* Major value of the beacon */,
  "minor" INTEGER /* Minor value of the beacon */,
  "tx_power" INTEGER /* TX power of the beacon */,
  "rssi" INTEGER /* RSSI (Received Signal Strength Indicator) of the beacon */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance from the beacon */,
  "beacon_status" TEXT /* Status of the beacon (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "beacon_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the beacon's distance measurement */,
  "beacon_flags" TEXT /* Flags indicating any issues with the beacon data (e.g., signal interference) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("beacon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beacon_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, system administrator, sensor operator) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., anomaly, threshold breach) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "alert_priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the alert (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who resolved the alert */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was resolved */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the resolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)
